user.title: NASA FIRMS Fires
user.description: Configure parameters to get fires detected by NASA FIRMS.

data_description.source: Select one or more satellite sources. Using multiple sources gives better temporal coverage (fires detected at different times of day). Duplicates are automatically removed.
data_description.radius_km: The search area is always defined in km. Miles only affect how fire distances are displayed in entity states.

error.api_key_invalid: The API key is invalid. It must be at least 10 characters long.
error.source_required: You must select at least one data source.

abort.already_configured: This integration is already configured for this location.
abort.max_instances_reached: Maximum number of instances reached (10). Remove an existing instance before adding a new one.

data_description.source: Select one or more satellite sources. Duplicates are automatically removed.
data_description.radius_km: The search area is always defined in km. Miles only affect how fire distances are displayed in entity states.

error.source_required: You must select at least one data source.

options.viirs_noaa21: VIIRS NOAA-21 — 375 m resolution, newest satellite (real-time)
